name: local-memory
description: Persistent local memory for Claude. 100% local, SQLite-based, zero API keys. Your data never leaves your machine.
long_description: Local Memory gives Claude a persistent memory across conversations. Sessions, learnings, decisions, and a knowledge graph -- all stored in a single SQLite file on your machine. No cloud, no account, no telemetry. Install with a double-click. 13 tools covering session tracking, learning storage with duplicate guard, full-text search via FTS5, decision logging, and a bi-temporal entity knowledge graph.

tools.name: memory_session_start
tools.description: Start a session and load previous context

tools.name: memory_session_end
tools.description: End the current session with a summary

tools.name: memory_learn
tools.description: Store a learning with duplicate detection

tools.name: memory_entity_observe
tools.description: Record a fact about an entity (auto-creates)

tools.name: memory_entity_open
tools.description: Load entity with observations and relations

tools.name: memory_entity_relate
tools.description: Create a typed relation between entities

tools.name: memory_profile
tools.description: Read or write a user profile field
